summary: Tested all 7 form design styles, campos visibles defaults (email/guests OFF), field distribution without gaps, enabling email toggle, and reservation creation with cristal design.

issues: Flotante card appears semi-transparent (rgba 255,255,255,0.45) instead of solid white due to Glass Aurora preset applying glassmorphism globally. Expected: solid white premium card. Minor visual issue.

action_items: Minor: Flotante design cardBg '#ffffff' may be overridden by global glassmorphism preset. Consider applying cardBg inline style to override the preset when design=flotante.
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation 'Test Cristal' Q25,000 Boda with cristal design
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 designs working (aurora=fullscreen, 6=floating). Email+guests OFF by default in SettingsContext FORM_FIELDS_DEFAULT. Enabling email via localStorage {email:true,guests:false} shows email field correctly in row 1 (Nombre+Teléfono+Email). Reservation creation works with cristal. Toggle selectors in Apariencia page do NOT use role='switch' for campo visibility toggles - they use custom components.

test_results.cristal_floating_glass: PASS - Opens as centered floating card with glass/blur overlay
test_results.email_hidden_default: PASS - Email field absent from form with default settings
test_results.guests_hidden_default: PASS - Guests field absent from form with default settings
test_results.no_empty_spaces: PASS - 10 visible inputs, fields fill space without gaps
test_results.flotante_card: PASS - White card floating modal (minor: slightly transparent due to preset)
test_results.elegante_dark_glass: PASS - Dark glass premium floating card confirmed
test_results.tarjeta_accent_bar: PASS - White card with purple/gradient accent bar at top
test_results.app_dark_navy: PASS - Dark navy floating card with accent bar
test_results.minimal_clean: PASS - White clean card with underline-style inputs
test_results.campos_visibles_defaults: PASS - Email del cliente OFF, N° de invitados OFF confirmed in Apariencia UI
test_results.enable_email_shows_in_form: PASS - Email field appears in form row when enabled via localStorage
test_results.create_reservation_cristal: PASS - 'Reserva creada' toast shown, dashboard count updated to 3
